constraints.layout_style: unstyled div soup with inline styles only

required_complexity_patterns.notes: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters)
Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words
Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form
At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value
Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options

reference_templates.title: Radio styled as buttons
reference_templates.notes: Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Radio pill buttons

Are you authorized to work in the UK?

reference_templates.title: Asterisk in sibling span
reference_templates.notes: Required marker asterisk lives in sibling span, not inside label text
reference_templates.dom_excerpt:
Sibling asterisk

reference_templates.title: Duplicate name attributes
reference_templates.notes: Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild)
reference_templates.dom_excerpt: Duplicate name attributes

prompt_summary: Create a messy, production-real ashby-style job application (single-page, small, tier=high). Widgets: combobox. Required: Multiple controls sharing name attribute groups (checkbox/radio clusters) Required: Label text split across multiple spans with no space between words Required: Newsletter or login decoy form separate from job application form Required: At least one readonly or disabled input with prefilled profile value Required: Combobox: button or input with aria-haspopup=listbox plus listbox/options Reference DOM (Radio styled as buttons): Native radios hidden; visible pill buttons styled via CSS class Reference DOM (Asterisk in sibling span): Required marker asterisk lives in sibling span, not inside label text Reference DOM (Duplicate name attributes): Two distinct fields share the same name attribute (invalid but seen in the wild) Do NOT produce a tutorial-style form where every field is label[for]+native input. Mix native controls with non-semantic production DOM from the patterns below. Implement ALL required complexity patterns: duplicate-name-attrs, glued-label-text, decoy-form, readonly-prefill, custom-combobox. Include at least one custom widget (div role=textbox, pill buttons, or listbox combobox). Include at least one labeling strategy besides label-for (aria-label, aria-labelledby, glued spans, placeholder-only). Layout: unstyled div soup with inline styles only. Avoid generic centered SaaS card as the only structure. High tier: include shadow DOM host OR iframe apply shell OR wizard/conditional reveal with hidden fields. Mirror structural messiness like these references: Radio styled as buttons; Asterisk in sibling span; Duplicate name attributes.
